narrative.candidateAngle: Software Engineer specializing in backend development and data engineering, leveraging Python and SQL for scalable solutions.

targetStory.roleLane: Software Engineer focused on backend and data engineering
targetStory.readerTakeaway: Proven experience in building scalable backend services and data pipelines using Python and SQL, with a strong emphasis on automation and data integr...

primaryStory: Backend services and REST APIs built with Python/Django for secure workflows
Data pipelines and ETL processes designed for real-time analytics
React dashboards integrated with backend services for operational visibility
Full-stack applications with a focus on financial data management
secondaryStory: AI/ML-related work in data processing and predictive modeling
Automation of workflows and reporting metrics
narrative.summaryGoal: Highlight backend and data engineering expertise with Python and SQL, emphasizing real-time data processing and scalable application development.

summaryDecision.reason: The summary connects the candidate's experience with the role's requirements, providing a clear overview of relevant skills and projects.
evidence: Experience with backend services and data pipelines
Integration of React for user-facing applications

skillsStrategy: Categories: Languages, Frameworks, Data Tools, Focus Areas
Supporting: Django, FastAPI, ETL Pipelines, Automation Systems
Trim last sparingly—only duplicates, narrative avoid, or clearly different‑realm fluff; keep same‑role‑family breadth (demote trailing, do not slash for JD keyword fit).

sectionStrategy.summary: Use summaryGoal to emphasize backend and data engineering skills
sectionStrategy.experience: Focus on heroExperience with strong leads from BitGo
sectionStrategy.projects: Highlight heroProjects with full rewrites for clarity
sectionStrategy.skills: Organize skills to reflect core competencies and breadth
sectionStrategy.education: Light—credentials frozen; trim highlights only if they sharpen scan.

layoutRationale: Prioritize sections that showcase relevant experience and skills for the Software Engineer role.
selectionRationale: Focus on the strongest evidence that aligns with the job description, ensuring the most relevant experiences and projects are highlighted.
rewriteGoals: Land BitGo: Emphasize backend services and data workflows
Land SentimentTrader: Highlight real-time data processing and analytics
Land Taylor.io: Showcase full-stack development and integration of AI
avoid: No claims of unsupported technologies or domains not evidenced in the resume.
narrative.alignmentGuidance: Direct fit: lead with the role title and strongest JD-overlap evidence, while preserving resume-native breadth.
